name: credential-zkp
description: Private Credential Verification using ZKP (Circom + Groth16)

scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 prove credential.zkey witness.wtns proof.json public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify verification_key.json public.json proof.json
scripts.full: npm run input && npm run build && npm run witness && npm run prove && npm run verify
